name: cursor-openrouter-proxy
description: OpenAI-compatible local proxy for Cursor that translates Anthropic-shape requests to OpenRouter, preserves 1-hour prompt caching, demotes Cursor's background variants, and exposes itself via a cloudflared quick tunnel — with status-bar cost tracking and one-click copy of the public URL.

commands.title: Cursor Proxy: Copy URL & Open Models Settings

cursorProxy.autoStart.description: Start the proxy + tunnel automatically when Cursor launches.

cursorProxy.port.description: Local TCP port for the proxy.

cursorProxy.backgroundFallbackModel.description: Cheap model used for Cursor's background (thinking/xhigh) variants that OpenRouter doesn't recognize.

cursorProxy.minMaxTokens.description: Raise Cursor's max_tokens floor to avoid truncated tool-call JSON.

cursorProxy.use1hCache.description: Upgrade ephemeral cache_control to Anthropic's 1-hour TTL beta. 2× write cost, but survives idle gaps.

cursorProxy.pinAnthropic.description: Pin OpenRouter routing to anthropic-direct so prompt caches persist across turns.

cursorProxy.attributionReferer.description: Optional value sent as the OpenRouter HTTP-Referer attribution header. Leave empty to use a generic project identifier (default). Set to your own URL only if you actively want your traffic attributed to it on OpenRouter's public leaderboard.

cursorProxy.attributionTitle.description: Optional value sent as the OpenRouter X-Title attribution header. Leave empty to use "Cursor Proxy" (default).

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run typecheck && npm run build
